_comment_: Citi TLM dashboard setup config. Copy to scripts/citi-tlm.json (or any path you pass via --config) and fill in real values. The 'reconmgmt' block is the single central manual-match DB. Each 'tlm_instances' entry is one per-TLM-instance schema — the key (TLMP_INV, TLMP_SNPB) is the value the dashboard's tlm_instance filter will pick from.
_password_handling_: Passwords mirror tlm-stats DatabaseConfig: either set 'password' explicitly per connection (local override, like the local Spring profile), OR omit it and the script fetches via password_script_path (Citi VM pattern — runs <script> <SERVICE_NAME_UPPER> <DB_SCHEMA_UPPER>). Default script path is /opt/rectify/control/scripts/get_password.sh, matching tlm-stats. Override globally with the top-level password_script_path field.

reconmgmt._password_optional_: Omit 'password' to fetch via password_script_path. Add a 'password' field if you want to hardcode (local override).
